sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point DCT/IDCT coefficient matrix ROM using Q14 orthonormal cosine constants.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_mac: Combinational eight-input signed multiply-accumulate datapath for one matrix row dot product.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_sat: Combinational Q14 rounding, scaling, and saturation to the configured output width.
